Mtn To Compel And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ZAKSKORAN CONSTRUCTION COMPANY DBA ZCON BUILDERS' Motion To Compel is moot as supplemental responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. Counsel are advised that the court would not sustain the objections set out in the separate statement and those objections would be overruled and ordered stricken. Any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege shall be identified with particularity. The court finds that the initial responses and the failure to verify those responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $920, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
